title: Live Plan
description: Live v1 plan contract for MC AI Live sessions, product scope, script/cue approval, guard readiness, and release evidence.
$comment: Sources: PACK-08, TECH-08, MASTER-07, PACK-10, and TECH-02. MC AI Live requires Live Plan, Product Scope, claim guard, privacy guard, stock/recall/sale-lock guard, and fake urgency guard. TODO: source documents do not define a complete live plan status enum.

plan_status.description: Live plan status. TODO: define official live plan status enum.

mc_ai_script_brief_id.description: Approved MC AI script brief identifier.

recall_sale_lock_guard_pass.description: Whether recall and sale lock guard passed.

no_fake_urgency.description: Invariant: live plan must not authorize fake urgency or fake scarcity.
